name: thoth
description: Pulumi provider for Aten Security Thoth AI governance control plane.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`thoth` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/atensecurity/terraform-provider-thoth).

nodejs.packageDescription: Pulumi provider for Aten Security Thoth AI governance control plane.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/atensecurity/terraform-provider-thoth)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-thoth` repo](https://github.com/atensecurity/pulumi-thoth/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-thoth` repo](https://github.com/atensecurity/terraform-provider-thoth/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/atensecurity/terraform-provider-thoth)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-thoth` repo](https://github.com/atensecurity/pulumi-thoth/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-thoth` repo](https://github.com/atensecurity/terraform-provider-thoth/issues).

adminBearerToken.description: Admin bearer token used for authenticated GovAPI requests.

adminBearerTokenFile.description: Path to a file containing the admin bearer token.

apexDomain.description: Apex domain used to derive GovAPI host when apiBaseUrl is omitted. Defaults to atensecurity.com.

apiBaseUrl.description: GovAPI base URL override. When omitted, provider derives https://grid.<tenant_id>.<apex_domain>.

retryBaseDelayMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds for exponential retry backoff.

retryMaxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API/network failures.

retryMaxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds for retry backoff.

tenantId.description: Tenant slug used in GovAPI route scoping.

provider.description:
The provider type for the thoth package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.
